comment: Class for comparing, ignoring data type check
codesample:
Dim compar as New MatchingDataTypeComparator(False)
Dim coll as New Collection(&quot;SCALAR&quot;, compar, False, True)
Call coll.add(2)
Call coll.add(&quot;1&quot;)
Print coll.join(&quot;,&quot;)    &apos; Prints 1,2

methods.label: compare
methods.comment: Overrides compare method in base class. Compare function, assuming both source and target are the same data type.
methods.signature: Function compare(source As Variant, target As Variant) As Integer

methods.label: equals
methods.comment:
Fnction to determine if twi values are determined to be identical.
Used by remove, replace, and contains functions
methods.codesample:
%REM
The following code is Collection.getIndex().
%END REM
ForAll elem in p_content
    If (Me.comparator.equals(checkValue, elem)) Then Return ListTag(elem)
End ForAll
